question.label: Settling check-in
question.name: What’s been most on your mind at work this week, Sam?
question.description: Gives Sam room to set the context before any friction is explored.

answer: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.

assessment.note: He can do the tasks but is unsure whether his approach matches team expectations, which is a mild clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Team expectations
new_queue.name: When you second-guess your approach, what feels hardest to read about team expectations?

new_queue.label: Ticket expectations
new_queue.name: What feels clear or unclear about what “done enough to ship” means here?

new_queue.label: Handoff map
new_queue.name: Where are the onboarding handoffs still fuzzy for you?

new_queue.label: Confidence trigger
new_queue.name: What tends to make you pause before shipping a ticket?

new_queue.label: Waiting on piece
new_queue.name: What are you usually waiting on when work starts to feel stuck?

new_queue.label: Support cadence
new_queue.name: What kind of check-in from me would be most useful over the next two weeks?

new_queue.label: Two-week takeaway
new_queue.name: What’s the one thing you want to have changed by our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
